NL.name: NL
NL.applicableDaysText:
Monday to Friday
 Mondays to Fridays

restrictions.outwardHtml:
Not valid on trains timed to depart after 04:29 and before 08:45 or after 16:00 and before 18:00.

The restriction after 16:00 and before 18:00 includes any connecting train departing during this period (or re-commencing your journey following a break of journey) within the following areas:

  • Transport for Greater Manchester area plus Alderley Edge, Birchwood, Burscough Bridge, Disley,  Dove Holes, Handforth, Hoscar, New Mills Central, New Mills Newtown, Padgate, Parbold, Styal, Warrington Bank Quay, Warrington Central, and Wilmslow;
  • Travel South Yorkshire area plus, Darton, Denby Dale, Moorthorpe and South Elmsall;
  • West Yorkshire Metro area plus Cononley, Harrogate,  Hornbeam Park, Knaresborough, Pannal, Skipton, Starbeck and Weeton.

Valid trains can also be checked using the journey planner at www.nationalrail.co.uk

Further information including maps of the restricted areas can be found on the Northern website.

O1.name: Chiltern Off-Peak (From 0930)
O1.seasonalVariationsHtml:
Ticket restrictions will be lifted as follows:

  • Friday 3rd to Monday 6th April 2026
  • Monday 4th May 2026
  • Monday 25th May 2026
  • Monday 31st August 2026
  • Thursday 24th December 2026 to Friday 1st January 2027

Off-Peak Day Travelcards and Family Travelcards are only valid on Transport for London services from 09:30 Mondays to Fridays. They are valid at any time at weekends and on public holidays.

 Monday 31st August 2026
 Thursday 24th December 2026 to Friday 1st January 2027

restrictions.outwardHtml:
Not valid on trains timed to arrive at other London Terminals or Kensington Olympia after 04:29 and before 10:00, except

07:41 from Heyford

07:45 from Tackley

Not valid for change of trains or break of journey between Heyford / Tackley and London Paddington. Boarding anywhere other than Heyford or Tackley with tickets from Heyford or Tackley is not permitted on this service. If Off-peak tickets from Heyford or Tackley include a travelcard, the travelcard element will not be valid for onward travel from London Paddington on the underground, buses or Elizabeth Line, until 09:30.

All times are inclusive
